metadata.description: Broad cross-reactivity reference epitopes (viral, cancer, drug hypersensitivity, mHAg, infectious disease)
metadata.note: These are known T-cell epitopes that could potentially cause cross-reactivity but lack direct evidence of off-target toxicity in TCR-T therapy.
